_comment: Single source of truth for Ifiale image output sizes. Read by image_tools.py and ifiale-image-studio.html. Sizes follow 2026 WooCommerce best practices.

product.label: Product — upload size
product._note: 1200×1200 is the upload standard. WooCommerce scales down to 800px (single page) and 600px (catalog). Target: under 200 KB WebP.

product800.label: Product — single page display
product800._note: WooCommerce displays main product image at 800px. Use when you need a lighter batch without zoom support.

category.label: Category thumbnail
category._note: WooCommerce catalog grid. Target: under 100 KB WebP.

shop.label: Shop grid thumbnail
shop._note: Cart widgets and small grid thumbnails. Target: under 40 KB WebP.

logo.label: Brand logo (transparent)
logo._note: Preserves transparency. WebP replaces PNG for logos — same quality, 40% smaller.
